    <h1 {...{
      "id": "brand-concierge-style-guide-android"
    }}>{`Brand Concierge Style Guide (Android)`}</h1>
    <p>{`This document provides a comprehensive reference for all styling properties supported by the Brand Concierge Android SDK. Themes are configured using JSON files that follow a web-compatible CSS variable format.`}</p>
    <InlineAlert variant="warning" slots="text" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Implementation Status`}</strong>{`: While the theme system parses all CSS variables for web compatibility, not all properties are currently used in the Android UI. See the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "#implementation-status"
      }}>{`Implementation Status`}</a>{` section for detailed information on which properties are actively rendered versus defined but unused.`}</p>
    <hr></hr>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "overview"
    }}>{`Overview`}</h2>
    <p>{`The theme configuration is loaded from a JSON file using `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`ConciergeThemeLoader.load(context, filename)`}</inlineCode>{`. The framework supports CSS-like variable names (prefixed with `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`--`}</inlineCode>{`) that are automatically mapped to native Kotlin properties.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "loading-a-theme"
    }}>{`Loading a theme`}</h3>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-kotlin"
      }}>{`// Load from app assets
val theme = ConciergeThemeLoader.load(context, "theme-default")

// Use default theme
val defaultTheme = ConciergeThemeLoader.default()
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "applying-a-theme"
    }}>{`Applying a theme`}</h3>
    <p>{`Apply the theme using the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`ConciergeTheme`}</inlineCode>{` composable:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-kotlin"
      }}>{`import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
import androidx.compose.runtime.remember
import androidx.compose.ui.platform.LocalContext
import com.adobe.marketing.mobile.concierge.ui.theme.ConciergeTheme
import com.adobe.marketing.mobile.concierge.ui.theme.ConciergeThemeLoader

@Composable
fun MyApp() {
    val context = LocalContext.current
    
    val theme = remember {
        ConciergeThemeLoader.load(context, "my-theme") 
            ?: ConciergeThemeLoader.default()
    }
    
    ConciergeTheme(theme = theme) {
        // Your app content here
        // Concierge UI components will use the theme
    }
}
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`You can also load themes by filename directly:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-kotlin"
      }}>{`@Composable
fun MyApp() {
    ConciergeTheme(themeFileName = "my-theme.json") {
        // Your app content here
    }
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "applying-a-theme-in-xmlviews"
    }}>{`Applying a theme in XML/Views`}</h3>
    <p>{`For XML-based apps using `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`ConciergeChatView`}</inlineCode>{`, pass the theme when binding:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-kotlin"
      }}>{`val theme = ConciergeThemeLoader.load(this, "my-theme")
chatView.bind(
    lifecycleOwner = this,
    viewModelStoreOwner = this,
    surfaces = surfaces,
    theme = theme,
    onClose = { finish() }
)
`}</code></pre>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Important:`}</strong>{` The `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`ConciergeTheme`}</inlineCode>{` composable provides theme tokens to all child composables through CompositionLocal.`}</p>

      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`When a theme is loaded`}</strong>{`: The theme JSON always takes precedence.`}</li>
    </ul>

    <p>{`To hide the disclaimer, omit the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`disclaimer`}</inlineCode>{` key or set `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`disclaimer.text`}</inlineCode>{` to an empty string.`}</p>

    <h2 {...{
      "id": "complete-example"
    }}>{`Complete Example`}</h2>
    <p>{`Place the theme file in your app's `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`assets`}</inlineCode>{` directory (e.g. `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`assets/my-theme.json`}</inlineCode>{`) and load it with `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`ConciergeThemeLoader.load(context, filename)`}</inlineCode>{` as shown in the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "#overview"
      }}>{`overview`}</a>{`. For XML/Views, pass the loaded theme into `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`ConciergeChatView.bind(...)`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-json"
      }}>{`{
  "metadata": {
    "brandName": "Concierge Demo",
    "version": "1.0.0",
    "language": "en-US",
    "namespace": "brand-concierge"
  },
  "behavior": {
    "multimodalCarousel": {
      "cardClickAction": "openLink"
    },
    "input": {
      "enableVoiceInput": true,
      "disableMultiline": false,
      "showAiChatIcon": null
    },
    "chat": {
      "messageAlignment": "left",
      "messageWidth": "100%"
    },
    "privacyNotice": {
      "title": "Privacy Notice",
      "text": "Privacy notice text."
    }
  },
  "disclaimer": {
    "text": "AI responses may be inaccurate. Check answers and sources. {Terms}",
    "links": [
      {
        "text": "Terms",
        "url": "https://www.adobe.com/legal/licenses-terms/adobe-gen-ai-user-guidelines.html"
      }
    ]
  },
  "text": {
    "welcome.heading": "Welcome to Brand Concierge!",
    "welcome.subheading": "I'm your personal guide to help you explore.",
    "input.placeholder": "How can I help?",
    "input.messageInput.aria": "Message input",
    "input.send.aria": "Send message",
    "feedback.dialog.title.positive": "Your feedback is appreciated",
    "feedback.dialog.submit": "Submit",
    "feedback.dialog.cancel": "Cancel"
  },
  "arrays": {
    "welcome.examples": [
      {
        "text": "I'd like to explore templates to see what I can create.",
        "image": "https://example.com/template.png",
        "backgroundColor": "#F5F5F5"
      }
    ],
    "feedback.positive.options": [
      "Helpful and relevant recommendations",
      "Clear and easy to understand",
      "Other"
    ],
    "feedback.negative.options": [
      "Didn't understand my request",
      "Unhelpful or irrelevant information",
      "Other"
    ]
  },
  "assets": {
    "icons": {
      "company": ""
    }
  },
  "theme": {
    "--welcome-input-order": "3",
    "--welcome-cards-order": "2",
    "--font-family": "",
    "--color-primary": "#EB1000",
    "--color-text": "#131313",
    "--line-height-body": "1.75",
    "--main-container-background": "#FFFFFF",
    "--main-container-bottom-background": "#FFFFFF",
    "--message-blocker-background": "#FFFFFF",
    "--input-height-mobile": "52px",
    "--input-border-radius-mobile": "12px",
    "--input-background": "#FFFFFF",
    "--input-outline-color": null,
    "--input-outline-width": "2px",
    "--input-focus-outline-width": "2px",
    "--input-focus-outline-color": "#4B75FF",
    "--input-font-size": "16px",
    "--input-text-color": "#292929",
    "--input-button-height": "32px",
    "--input-button-width": "32px",
    "--input-button-border-radius": "8px",
    "--input-box-shadow": "0 2px 8px 0 #00000014",
    "--submit-button-fill-color": "#FFFFFF",
    "--submit-button-fill-color-disabled": "#C6C6C6",
    "--color-button-submit": "#292929",
    "--button-disabled-background": "#FFFFFF",
    "--button-primary-background": "#3B63FB",
    "--button-primary-text": "#FFFFFF",
    "--button-secondary-border": "#2C2C2C",
    "--button-secondary-text": "#2C2C2C",
    "--button-height-s": "30px",
    "--disclaimer-color": "#4B4B4B",
    "--disclaimer-font-size": "12px",
    "--disclaimer-font-weight": "400",
    "--message-user-background": "#EBEEFF",
    "--message-user-text": "#292929",
    "--message-concierge-background": "#F5F5F5",
    "--message-concierge-text": "#292929",
    "--message-concierge-link-color": "#274DEA",
    "--message-border-radius": "10px",
    "--message-padding": "8px 16px",
    "--message-max-width": "100%",
    "--chat-interface-max-width": "768px",
    "--chat-history-padding": "16px",
    "--chat-history-padding-top-expanded": "0",
    "--chat-history-bottom-padding": "0",
    "--message-blocker-height": "105px",
    "--border-radius-card": "16px",
    "--multimodal-card-box-shadow": "none",
    "--feedback-container-gap": "4px",
    "--feedback-icon-btn-background": "#FFFFFF",
    "--feedback-icon-btn-size-desktop": "32px",
    "--citations-text-font-weight": "700",
    "--citations-desktop-button-font-size": "12px"
  }
}
`}</code></pre>
